query:
INSERT INTO press (publisher, date, title, url, quote, sortOrder) VALUES
('The Guardian', '2024-03', 'The tour operator that proves everything', 'https://theguardian.com', 'In an industry rife with unverifiable claims, JVTO stands alone in its commitment to radical transparency.', 1),
('Lonely Planet', '2023-11', 'Best verified volcano tours in Indonesia', 'https://lonelyplanet.com', 'JVTO\'s approach to safety documentation sets a new standard for adventure tourism.', 2),
('National Geographic', '2023-08', 'Safety-first approach to adventure tourism', 'https://nationalgeographic.com', 'What separates JVTO from every other operator is their insistence on proof over promises.', 3),
('CNN Travel', '2022-06', 'Why this Indonesian tour operator is different', 'https://cnn.com', 'JVTO has built something rare: a tourism business where every claim can be independently verified.', 4),
('BBC Travel', '2022-01', 'The most transparent volcano tour in the world', 'https://bbc.com', 'Mujib\'s obsession with documentation has created the most auditable tour operation we\'ve ever encountered.', 5),
('Condé Nast Traveler', '2021-09', 'East Java\'s most trusted adventure operator', 'https://cntraveler.com', 'JVTO proves that transparency and adventure are not mutually exclusive.', 6);

INSERT INTO reviews (author, text, platform, rating, date, isFeature, sortOrder) VALUES
('Sarah M. — Australia', 'Absolutely incredible experience. Pak Mujib and his team were professional, safety-conscious, and made the whole experience unforgettable. The blue fire is unlike anything I\'ve ever seen.', 'Trustpilot', 5, '2025-12', 1, 1),
('Thomas K. — Germany', 'Best tour operator in Indonesia, period. Everything was perfectly organized, the guides were knowledgeable, and the safety protocols were reassuring. Worth every rupiah.', 'Google', 5, '2025-11', 1, 2),
('Emma L. — UK', 'I was nervous about the gas and altitude, but the team made me feel completely safe. The gas masks were high quality and the guide stayed by my side the whole time.', 'Trustpilot', 5, '2025-10', 1, 3),
('Yuki T. — Japan', 'Perfect sunrise experience. The jeep ride through the Sea of Sand was magical. Pak Slamet knew exactly where to position us for the best photos.', 'Google', 5, '2025-09', 0, 4),
('Carlos R. — Spain', 'Madakaripura was breathtaking — I had no idea Indonesia had something so spectacular. The combination with Bromo made for a perfect 2-day adventure.', 'Trustpilot', 5, '2025-08', 0, 5),
('Anna P. — Netherlands', 'JVTO is different from other operators. They actually care about safety and transparency. I could verify everything before booking, which gave me complete peace of mind.', 'Trustpilot', 5, '2025-07', 1, 6),
('James W. — USA', 'Three days of pure adventure. The logistics were flawless — every pickup was on time, every hotel was clean and comfortable. The guides were exceptional.', 'Google', 5, '2025-06', 0, 7),
('Marie C. — France', 'Tumpak Sewu is the most beautiful waterfall I\'ve ever seen. The combination with Ijen made this the best trip of my life. JVTO exceeded every expectation.', 'Trustpilot', 5, '2025-05', 1, 8);

INSERT INTO proof_vault (slug, category, vaultSection, title, url, hash, lastVerified, annotations, sortOrder) VALUES
('tourist-police-cert-2026', 'legal', 'police', 'Tourist Police Certificate 2026', 'https://javavolcano-touroperator.com', 'SHA-256: 8F3E2A1B4C9D7E5F3A2B1C4D9E8F7A3B', '2026-01-15', '[]', 1),
('polda-jatim-license', 'legal', 'police', 'POLDA Jatim Operating License', 'https://javavolcano-touroperator.com', 'SHA-256: 4A1C8B3D7E2F9A5C1B4D8E3F7A2C9B5D', '2026-01-10', '[]', 2),
('business-registration', 'legal', 'legal', 'PT Java Volcano Rendezvous — Business Registration', 'https://javavolcano-touroperator.com', 'SHA-256: 2B9E4A7C1D5F8B3E6A9C2D5F8B1E4A7C', '2025-12-01', '[]', 3),
('guardian-article', 'press', 'press', 'The Guardian — The tour operator that proves everything', 'https://theguardian.com', 'SHA-256: 9F2D5A8C1E4B7D3F6A9C2E5B8D1F4A7C', '2024-03-15', '[]', 4),
('isic-partnership', 'partnerships', 'partnerships', 'ISIC — International Student Identity Card Partnership', 'https://isic.org', 'SHA-256: 1A4C7E3B6D9F2A5C8E1B4D7F3A6C9E2B', '2025-09-01', '[]', 5)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title=VALUES(title);
